calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2009 Off Calendar

Notice And Application For Writ Of Possession And Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-22-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff General Electric Capital Corporation's Application for writ of possession granted. Bond is waived pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure 515.010(b); defendant shall post a bond in the sum of $13,950.00 to avoid levy. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
